title: malvastrum diminutivum
intro: Malvastrum diminutivum is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the dwarf mallow or small mallow. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Malvastrum diminutivum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce coughs, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and sinusitis. Herbal preparations of Malvastrum diminutivum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to calm respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
